since_last: 47% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.89%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -3.33% · Gold -2.80% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 47% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.89%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.89%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +9.15%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +9.15%, LRCX +5.30%, UPST +4.83%, AMAT +4.44%, ZBRA +4.23%. Laggards: BBAI -5.84%, MDB -5.77%, SMR -5.34%, AVAV -4.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.58% at $153.64
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
